preReview.title: LA Galaxy vs Sporting Kansas City: 'Debemos luchar y apoyarnos', dice Paintsil
preReview.description: El LA Galaxy espera romper su racha sin victorias cuando reciba al Sporting Kansas City en una batalla crucial del fondo de la Conferencia Oeste.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy v Sporting Kansas City: ‘We need to stand and fight for each other’, says Paintsil
preReview.description: The LA Galaxy will be hoping to snap their winless run when they host Sporting Kansas City in a Western Conference basement battle.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy x Sporting Kansas City: 'Precisamos nos unir e lutar uns pelos outros', diz Paintsil
preReview.description: O LA Galaxy espera acabar com sua sequência sem vitórias ao receber o Sporting Kansas City em um duelo na parte inferior da tabela da Conferência Oeste.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy contro Sporting Kansas City: «Dobbiamo resistere e lottare insieme», dice Paintsil
preReview.description: I LA Galaxy sperano di interrompere la loro serie senza vittorie quando ospiteranno lo Sporting Kansas City in una sfida tra squadre di fondo classifica della Western Conference.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy contre Sporting Kansas City : 'Nous devons nous battre les uns pour les autres', déclare Paintsil
preReview.description: Les LA Galaxy espèrent mettre fin à leur série sans victoire en accueillant Sporting Kansas City dans une bataille au bas du classement de la Conférence Ouest.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy gegen Sporting Kansas City: 'Wir müssen füreinander kämpfen', sagt Paintsil
preReview.description: Die LA Galaxy hoffen, ihren sieglosen Lauf zu beenden, wenn sie im Kellerduell der Western Conference Sporting Kansas City empfangen.

preReview.title: لوس أنجلوس جالاكسي ضد سابورتينج كانساس سيتي: "علينا أن نقف ونقاتل من أجل بعضنا البعض" يقول بينتسيل
preReview.description: سيكون لوس أنجلوس جالاكسي يأمل في كسر سلسلة عدم الفوز عندما يستضيفون سابورتينج كانساس سيتي في معركة القاع بالمؤتمر الغربي.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy v Sporting Kansas City: 'Precisamos nos erguer e lutar uns pelos outros', diz Paintsil
preReview.description: O LA Galaxy espera quebrar a série de jogos sem vitória quando receber o Sporting Kansas City em uma batalha na base da Conferência Oeste.

QAData.question: Who won between LA Galaxy and Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: LA Galaxy won 4–1 over Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 28 Sep 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
